name: CORP
description: The CORP formed from a merger of three gangs in the early to mid 1960s: Mohawk Street (Mohawks), Hudson Street (Hudson's), and the Cleveland Jammers. The name was derived from members of the St. Michael's church parish. By 1970-71, the CORP considered themselves one of the most formidable gangs in their territory, with an estimated 200 members.
symbols: Cross With Three Points Above It
